Theorem pos_mul_add_distr_r p q r :
  (p + q) * r = p * r + q * r.

goals.conclusion: (p + q) * r = p * r + q * r
(p + q) * r = p * r + q * r

contents: Theorem pos_mul_assoc p q r : p * (q * r) = p * q * r.

Lemma pos_mul_succ_l p q
  : (pos_succ p) * q = p * q + q.

goals.conclusion: pos_succ p * q = p * q + q
pos_succ p * q = p * q + q

Lemma pos_mul_succ_r p q
  : p * (pos_succ q) = p + p * q.

goals.conclusion: p * pos_succ q = p + p * q
p * pos_succ q = p + p * q
